meta.title: JoyBormi
meta.description: JoyBormi is an online booking platform where you can easily reserve restaurants, cafés, salons, and other venues.

home.title: Home
home.description: Discover and book restaurants, cafés, and services easily with JoyBormi.

about.title: About Us
about.description: JoyBormi helps people easily find and reserve the best places. Learn more about our mission and platform.

link.openingDescription: If the app did not open, continue with one of the links below.

landing.headline: Reserve the right place in seconds
landing.description: JoyBormi helps you discover trusted brands and specialists with instant booking slots.
landing.experienceTitle: Premium local experiences, one tap away
landing.experienceBody: Join people using JoyBormi daily to book beauty, dining, and lifestyle services without calls.
landing.proofProfiles: Only verified brand and worker profiles
landing.blogTeaser: New ideas and booking tips from JoyBormi updates.

landingCompact.headline: Download the app and find exactly what you need
landingCompact.description: Point your camera at the QR code to install JoyBormi and start booking instantly.
landingCompact.availability: The mobile app is available now

landingModern.description: JoyBormi brings everything you need into one clean mobile experience. Discover trusted places, reserve faster, and manage plans without friction.

qr.title: Scan to download
qr.description: Point your camera at the QR code to install JoyBormi instantly.

footer.brandDescription: A premium booking experience for modern users on iOS and Android.
footer.newsletterDescription: Get product updates and release notes.

legal.retry: Please try again later or contact support.

about.headline: Building the future of {accent}
about.description: We are a passionate team of creators, engineers, and dreamers dedicated to making technology that empowers people to do their best work.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Our goal is simple: eliminate friction in daily tasks. We believe that software should be intuitive, fast, and beautiful. Every line of code we write and every pixel we push is aimed at giving you back your most valuable resource—time.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.subtitle: The talented people behind the scenes making the magic happen.

cta.title: Want to join us?
cta.description: We are always looking for talented individuals to join our growing team.
